econometric_sources.wage_floor: ILOSTAT — India Labour Force Survey 2022, median monthly earnings by occupation
econometric_sources.employer_demand: World Bank Enterprise Survey (WBES) India 2022 — % firms reporting difficulty finding qualified workers by sector
econometric_sources.sector_growth: ILOSTAT — India sectoral employment growth rate 2019-2022

opportunities.title: Mobile Phone Repair Technician
opportunities.honest_description: High footfall in urban markets where repair is cheaper than replacement. Demand is strongest where shared devices and budget handsets are common. Good work depends on diagnostic skill, not brand certification alone.

bridge.ready_if: Fault Diagnosis at Functional level or above
bridge.gap_to_close: If at Entry: 3-6 months supervised practice on common faults closes the gap

opportunities.title: Street Food / Small Catering Operator
opportunities.honest_description: Accessible in dense neighborhoods and transit corridors. Earnings vary widely by location, hygiene, and repeat customers. The biggest barrier is not skill alone but micro-capital and permissions.

bridge.ready_if: Communication and Process Quality at Entry or above
bridge.gap_to_close: Basic food safety and inventory discipline make the difference
bridge.training_option: Local food safety and small business course — 2-4 weeks

opportunities.title: Construction Helper / Finishing Worker
opportunities.honest_description: Urban construction has strong demand for finishing, site support, and skilled helper roles. Work is often project-based and can be seasonal. Reliability and speed matter as much as technical ability.

bridge.ready_if: Process Quality and Operational Organization at Entry level or above
bridge.gap_to_close: On-site orientation is usually enough for entry roles

opportunities.title: Gig Delivery / Field Service Associate
opportunities.honest_description: Fast-growing in urban corridors with smartphone access and predictable transport routes. Earnings depend on ratings, scheduling, and fuel or bike access. The strongest workers combine customer communication with reliable time management.

bridge.ready_if: Communication and Operational Organization at any level
bridge.gap_to_close: Platform onboarding and smartphone literacy are the main steps
bridge.training_option: Platform onboarding / route navigation training — 2-5 days

opportunities.title: Industrial Training Institute (ITI) Certificate Pathway
opportunities.honest_description: ITI pathways are a portable route into formal trades and apprenticeships. The credential matters because employers can verify the skill signal quickly. Good option when informal experience is real but hard to prove.

bridge.ready_if: Any skill level — this is a development pathway
bridge.gap_to_close: No prerequisite. Existing informal work can count as prior learning in some centers.
bridge.training_option: Government ITI / apprenticeship route — varies by state

opportunities.title: Tailoring / Alterations Operator
opportunities.honest_description: Custom work and alteration services remain resilient where ready-made clothing does not fit the customer well. Earnings improve when work is fast, neat, and trustworthy. Small capital needs make this accessible for many youth and women.

bridge.ready_if: Communication and Process Quality at Entry or above
bridge.gap_to_close: 2-3 months apprenticeship can open paid work
